title: Gunnarella neocaledonica
taxonomy: Gunnarella neocaledonica is classified in the family Orchidaceae, which is the largest family of flowering plants. This species is a type of epiphytic orchid, meaning it grows on other plants but does not derive nutrients from them. Within the Orchidaceae family, Gunnarella neocaledonica is further classified in the subfamily Epidendroideae and the tribe Coelogyneae. The genus Gunnarella is a small group of orchids that are native to New Caledonia. The classification of Gunnarella neocaledonica is subject to revision as new research and discoveries are made in the field of plant taxonomy.
